title: Fermented Indian Chickpea Crumble
description: A chewy and indulgent fermented greek dish featuring birds-eye chillies, bhuna spices, and other aromatic ingredients for a fodmap-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: 1 cup cooked chickpeas
ingredients.notes: Ensure they are soaked and sprouted for at least 24 hours

instructions: Combine the soaked and sprouted chickpeas with finely chopped onions, birds-eye chillies (cut into small pieces), bhuna masala powder, and a pinch of salt.
Add enough water to make it form a thick crumble texture. Stir gently to combine all ingredients.
Transfer the mixture onto a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Stir continuously for about 10 minutes until the moisture evaporates and you have a dense, chewy crumble.
